mck_info.longBusinessSummary: Development Investment Construction Joint Stock Corporation, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the real estate, construction, and trading and services businesses in Vietnam. The company trades in real estate, land use rights belonging to owners, and users of tenants; invests in development of new urban areas and industrial zones, housing and technical infrastructure in urban areas, industrial parks, export processing zones, high-tech zones, and new economic zones; and purchases and sells housing. It also offers real estate consulting, brokerage, and property and land use rights auction, as well as real estate brokerage services; management consulting services, including investment consulting and projects management; and short stay services, such as travel services, tourist accommodation, and hotels and resorts. In addition, the company engages in architectural activities and related technical consulting, supervision of civil and industrial project construction; house construction; and construction of drainage and sewage systems. Further, it is involved in the manufacturing of plastic and wooden doors; exploitation of stone, sand, gravel, and clay; production of commercial fresh and prefabricated concrete, tile, block, and brick; mining; interior and exterior decoration; and passenger transportation. The company was formerly known as Development Investment Construction Corporation and changed its name to Development Investment Construction Joint Stock Corporation in January 2008. Development Investment Construction Joint Stock Corporation was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Vung Tàu, Vietnam.
